zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes de Dunbar於1335年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood25歲，母親Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March36歲。她於大約1345年與Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年10月在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾蘭黛_享年43歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安紐巴特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes de Dunbar于1335年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood25岁，母亲Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March36岁。她于大约1345年与Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年10月在苏格兰貝維其可爾蘭黛_享年43岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安紐巴特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes de Dunbar was born in 1335, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, was 36. She married Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes about 1345. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in October 1378, in Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Newbattle, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes de Dunbar est née en 1335, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes environ 1345. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en octobre 1378, à Lauder, Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Newbattle, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes de Dunbar 1335 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March 36. Sie hat um 1345 Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Oktober 1378 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland und wurde in Newbattle, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes de Dunbar è nata il nel 1335 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes circa 1345. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel ottobre 1378, nel Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Newbattle, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Dunbarが1335年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwoodは25歳，母Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and Marchは36歳であった。約1345年にSir Patrick Hepburn of Hailesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年10月にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアラウダーで43歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドミドロスアンニューバットルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Dunbar(이)가 1335년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1345년 Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 10월 스컷랜드 버윅실르 로더에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 뉴바틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes de Dunbar nasceu em 1335, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes aproximadamente 1345. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1378, em Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Newbattle, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes de Dunbar родилась в 1335 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes около 1345 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла октябрь 1378 г. в местности лаудир, бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности нюбаттл, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes de Dunbar nació en 1335, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes aproximadamente 1345. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en octubre de 1378, en Lauder, Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Newbattle, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
